description_long: This is a modern, rectangular two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front facade features a large garage door on the ground level and a spacious balcony with metal railings above, accessible via an exterior staircase. Expansive glass windows dominate the upper floor, providing ample natural light and a sleek appearance. The side of the house is mostly solid, with a single door and a prominent staircase leading to the balcony. The rear and opposite side are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal decorative elements. The overall structure is composed of concrete or stucco walls, metal railings, and large glass panels, giving it a contemporary urban feel.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, a balcony, and an exterior staircase. The design is minimalist and urban, featuring a prominent garage and metal railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, balcony with metal railings, and the start of the exterior staircase.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large glass windows on both floors and the open balcony area.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain wall, garage door, and the continuation of the exterior staircase.
description_view_3: Side view dominated by the exterior staircase, a single door, and minimal windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry via a large garage door and a secondary door accessed by an exterior metal staircase and balcony, with minimal decorative elements.
